questionHtml: Outline why the initial reaction should be carried out under a fume hood.
markschemeHtml:
NO2/NO/NOx/HNO3/gas is poisonous/toxic/irritant ✔

 

Accept formula or name.

Accept “HNO3 is corrosive” OR “poisonous/toxic gases produced”.

Accept “reaction is harmful/hazardous”.

meta.title: Outline why the initial reaction should be carried out under a fume hood.
